overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey begins in a narrow corridor with digital billboards, ascends a red-lit staircase, and emerges into an open plaza with massive holographic advertisements and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow pedestrian corridor with digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow corridor lined with glowing digital billboards and neon graffiti on the walls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying brand logo on the right wall
wall covered in glowing neon graffiti art including Asian characters
row of illuminated vending kiosks at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed corridor with concrete walls. Digital billboards glow on the right wall while neon graffiti illuminates the left. The character walks forward toward a set of stairs visible in the distance, passing vending machines and scattered debris on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level concrete staircase with red neon edge lighting

events.description: enters the red-lit staircase from the corridor below
reaches the top landing of the stairs and prepares to turn

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs illuminated by red neon strips along each step edge

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hat and coat descending the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with bright red neon lighting along the edge of each step
large vertical advertisement at the top of the stairs displaying health warning text

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a dramatic staircase bathed in red neon light. Concrete walls flank both sides while other pedestrians move up and down the steps. At the top, a large digital billboard becomes visible as the character approaches the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with teal neon railings

events.description: exits stairwell onto upper walkway with teal neon lighting
turns corner toward the open plaza with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level walkway passing trash bags and wall graffiti

entered.detail: metal railing illuminated with continuous teal neon light strips
pile of garbage bags and debris against the left wall
large wall mural of a motorcycle rider in teal and red colors
vertical digital display showing advertisement with muscular figure

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character walks along an elevated walkway featuring teal neon railings. The environment shows signs of urban decay with trash bags piled against walls and colorful graffiti murals. The walkway curves toward an opening revealing the bright lights of the plaza ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk plaza with massive holographic advertisements and neon billboards

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into open plaza with holographic dragon statue
passes the large holographic dragon projection in the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza admiring massive holographic displays and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian running across the plaza toward the left

entered.detail: large cylindrical holographic projection of a coiled dragon with glowing teal edges
giant vertical building facade covered in neon signage reading BRAIN WASH
tall buildings covered in multiple layers of illuminated advertisements and neon lights
covered walkway structure with vertical blue neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast open plaza dominated by a massive holographic dragon statue glowing with teal light. Towering buildings covered in neon advertisements, including a prominent Brain Wash sign, surround the area. The character walks past the hologram and continues under an overpass lined with blue neon lights, fully immersed in the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic urban corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched futuristic plaza. It begins by moving through a narrow concrete passage where digital billboards and neon graffiti cast a glow over vending machines and scattered debris. As the camera advances, the scene shifts upward along a dramatic staircase bathed in red neon light, passing other pedestrians before reaching an elevated level. The path then transitions onto a curving walkway with teal railings and graffiti-covered walls, gradually opening up to reveal the bright lights of the city ahead. Finally, the camera emerges into a vast open plaza dominated by a massive teal holographic dragon and towering neon advertisements, continuing under a blue-lit overpass into the heart of the cyberpunk cityscape.
